metadata.title: Susi Lash — Luxury Lash Artist | Susi Manukyan
metadata.description: Internationally recognized luxury lash artist Susi Manukyan. Bespoke lash extensions crafted with precision, artistry, and uncompromising elegance.

hero.subtitle: Bespoke luxury lash extensions by internationally recognized artist {artist}
hero.imageAlt: Luxury lash extensions by Susi Lash

portfolio.label: Portfolio
portfolio.title: Signature Work
portfolio.description: A curated selection of bespoke lash artistry — each set a study in precision, balance, and quiet luxury.

about.label: My Story
about.title: About Me
bio: Hello, I'm Susi — a lash and brow specialist. I took my first steps in this field years ago. It has been one of the most important and right decisions of my life.
Like the beginning of any new path, this journey started out quite difficult for me. But what helped me was my love for all of this.

Sparing no effort, energy, strength, time, or money, I completed every training that seemed possible — and impossible — in different corners of the world. All of that earned me recognition as a leading and trusted specialist.
After all of this, I had a goal: to create my own brand.
about.pageDescription: Recognition, certificates, trophies, and the story behind Susi Lash.

courses.title: Courses
courses.intro: I offer foundational courses in both group and private formats.
details: Models: arranged by me, or you may bring your own
body: During the course, we will carefully study every nuance of lash fills, and reinforce what you learn through hands-on practice.
A certificate is provided at the end of the course.
courses.upcomingEmpty: No upcoming courses at the moment. Follow Susi on Instagram and Telegram for new dates.
courses.pastEmpty: Past courses will appear here after they take place.

items.title: Masterclass in Essen
items.description: A full-day professional masterclass with Susi — focused on precision technique, artistry, and studio-level results.

products.label: The Collection
products.title: Susi Lash Products
products.description: A professional lash care line developed by Susi — refined formulas and tools created for artists and clients who expect the same standard of excellence as her studio work.

hero.title: Lash Extensions
hero.subtitle: The heart of the line — personally developed by {artist} for lash artists who expect studio-level precision and quiet luxury.
hero.imageAlt: Susi Lash lash extensions — the flagship product of the collection

grid.label: The Line
grid.title: Complete the Collection
grid.description: Every tool and formula designed to uphold the same standard of excellence found in Susi's studio.

items.name: Lash Extensions
items.description: Premium lash trays in curated lengths and curls — selected for precision application and signature Susi Lash styling.

items.name: Volume Lash Extensions
items.description: Curated lash trays in refined lengths and curls — crafted for volume artistry and signature Susi Lash results.

items.name: Lash Boxes
items.description: Elegant storage solutions designed to keep lash products organized, protected, and presentation-ready in the studio.

items.name: Lash Trays
items.description: A plastic working tray for temporarily attaching lashes — used as a palette (planshet) during application for organized, efficient studio work.

items.name: Lash Brushes
items.description: Professional application brushes crafted for controlled, flawless placement during every lash service.

items.name: Lash Cleansing Brushes
items.description: Fine cleansing brushes designed for gentle, thorough lash care between appointments.

items.name: Lash Mirrors
items.description: Precision mirrors for detailed lash work — essential tools for perfect angles and refined finishing.

items.name: Lash Tweezers
items.description: Precision tweezers engineered for isolation and placement — an essential tool for flawless lash application.

recognition.label: Distinction

items.title: International Lash Artist of the Year

items.title: Gold Medal — Creative Lash Design
items.description: First place in the international creative lash category.

items.title: Master Lash Technician Certification
items.description: Advanced certification in volume, mega volume, and corrective techniques.

items.title: Featured Artist
items.description: Editorial feature on the evolution of luxury lash extensions.

items.title: European Lash Competition — Finalist

testimonials.label: Kind Words
testimonials.title: Client Testimonials
testimonials.description: Reflections from clients who have experienced the art of luxury lash extensions with Susi Manukyan.

items.quote: Susi's work is unlike anything I've experienced. Every lash is placed with intention — the result is effortlessly glamorous yet completely natural.
items.author: Victoria R.

items.quote: I've traveled from London specifically for Susi's artistry. Her attention to detail and refined aesthetic are truly world-class.
items.author: Amelia K.

items.quote: The most luxurious lash experience I've ever had. From consultation to the final look, everything feels bespoke and considered.
items.author: Danielle M.
